{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The feedback identifies the core conceptual issue (contradiction about the main contribution) and proposes a restructuring to address it.",
    "R1.5": "Suggests a reorganization of the section, but doesn't provide a complete end-to-end plan with rationale for each section.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty about the Delta Lake comparison and the 38% reduction claim, but doesn't explicitly mark confidence levels for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly stays within scope, but the Parquet redundancy point is a minor drift from the requested active set.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the feedback focuses on potential issues and improvements without introducing new errors.",
    "RX.5": "The feedback lacks specific traceability annotations for proposed changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.5": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The feedback identifies the core conceptual issue (contradiction about the main contribution) and proposes a restructuring to address it.
rationale.R1.5: Suggests a reorganization of the section, but doesn't provide a complete end-to-end plan with rationale for each section.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about the Delta Lake comparison and the 38% reduction claim, but doesn't explicitly mark confidence levels for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly stays within scope, but the Parquet redundancy point is a minor drift from the requested active set.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the feedback focuses on potential issues and improvements without introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: The feedback lacks specific traceability annotations for proposed changes.
